'''âj-dh-b-g''' ('''kajadhbegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dual|dual]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-dh-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dual|dual]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-dh-b-g
|-
! Lemma
| kajadhbegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijadhbegoko|thijadhbegoko]] || [[word:jijadhbegoko|jijadhbegoko]] || [[word:shijadhbegoko|shijadhbegoko]] || [[word:kijadhbegoko|kijadhbegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujadhbegoko|thuthujadhbegoko]] || [[word:jujujadhbegoko|jujujadhbegoko]] || [[word:shushujadhbegoko|shushujadhbegoko]] || [[word:kukujadhbegoko|kukujadhbegoko]]
|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
